# Replit Deployment Guide

## Quick Setup (5 minutes)

### Step 1: Go to Replit
1. Visit https://replit.com
2. Sign up with GitHub (or email)

### Step 2: Import Your Repository
1. Click **"Create"** button
2. Click **"Import from GitHub"**
3. Paste: `https://github.com/samad001z/bidscrutiny-engine.github.io`
4. Click **Import project**

### Step 3: Add Environment Variables
1. Click **"Secrets"** (lock icon) in left sidebar
2. Add these secrets:

```
FIREBASE_SERVICE_ACCOUNT_

FIREBASE_STORAGE_BUCKET=bidscrutiny-4b0ea.appspot.com

GEMINI_API_KEY=AIzaSyCWExtdBSI3RLRRjCthbMaQLDnrhKOOZZw
```

### Step 4: Run!
1. Click **Run** button (top center)
2. Your app will start in 2-3 minutes
3. You'll get a URL like: `https://bidscrutiny-engine.repl.co`

### Step 5: Connect Frontend
In Vercel, set environment variable:
```
VITE_API_URL=https://your-replit-url.repl.co
```

## Done! 🚀

Your backend is now live and running 24/7 on Replit for free!
